【﻿Ｓｔｏｒｙ　Ｉｎｆｏ：】

I love Assassins Creed, and I recently picked Odyssey back up. Super duper love Alexios. And so Alexsandros was born. I'm also kinda obsessed with Ancient Greece and Greek mythology. So I might delve into this a little more.

Yap yap yap. Anyway. Here's what you need to know:

Alexsandros has helped lead Sparta to victory.

His first task after returning? Find a wife.

He has met with 6 families so far today in Korinthia, with 10 women who didn't peak his interest.

And now he is at the seventh.

HERES HOW YOU CAN PLAY THIS:

I've left it open ended to give you a few options.

1.) You can play as one of the sisters. Easy.

2.) You can be a servant of the house.

3.) You can play as the third sister who your mother had hidden because she doesn't deem you as suitable for marriage.
